data.title: Renasant Director Dr. Richard Heyer to Retire
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Renasant ( (RNST) ) has shared an announcement.

On November 10, 2025, Dr. Richard Heyer informed Renasant Corporation that he will not seek re-election as a director at the company’s 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, scheduled for April 28, 2026. Dr. Heyer will also retire from the board of Renasant Bank, a subsidiary of the company. His decision was not due to any disagreements with the company’s operations, policies, or practices.

The most recent analyst rating on (RNST) stock is a Hold with a $38.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Renasant stock, see the RNST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on RNST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, RNST is a Neutral.

Renasant’s overall stock score is driven by strong financial performance, particularly in cash flow generation, and positive earnings call sentiment. However, technical analysis indicates potential bearish trends, and valuation metrics suggest the stock is fairly priced. The company’s stable financial position and positive guidance are offset by challenges in deposit growth and increased credit loss provisions.

To see Spark’s full report on RNST stock, click here.

More about Renasant

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Brasnova Energy Materials Expands into Brazil with Phosphate Project Acquisition
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

Prime Meridian Resources ( (TSE:BEM) ) has issued an announcement.

Brasnova Energy Materials Inc. has acquired phosphate exploration concessions in Piaui, Brazil, covering 10,198 hectares. The Piaui Verde Phosphate Project aims to explore phosphate mineralization with potential for critical metals like copper and nickel. This project aligns with the U.S. adding phosphate to its Critical Minerals List, enhancing Brasnova’s strategic positioning in the fertilizer and battery sectors.

More about Prime Meridian Resources

Brasnova Energy Materials Inc. is focused on securing, developing, and monetizing energy materials assets and technologies to build shareholder value.

Average Trading Volume: 26,844

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$5.74M

data.title: SMX Initiates Reverse Stock Split to Optimize Share Structure
data.description:
Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

SMX Public Limited Company ( (SMX) ) has issued an announcement.

On November 18, 2025, SMX (Security Matters) Public Limited Company will implement a reverse stock split, consolidating every eight ordinary shares into one. This move, approved by the Board of Directors, reduces the number of outstanding shares from 8,404,581 to 1,050,572 and adjusts all related securities proportionately. The reverse stock split aims to enhance the company’s stock market positioning and streamline its share structure, impacting shareholders by aggregating fractional shares for market sale.

More about SMX Public Limited Company

SMX (Security Matters) Public Limited Company operates in the technology sector, providing marking, tracking, measuring, and digital platform technology solutions. The company focuses on helping businesses transition to a low-carbon economy by addressing challenges related to carbon neutrality and compliance with governmental and regional regulations.

Average Trading Volume: 2,004,614

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $2.36M

An update from Cincinnati Financial ( (CINF) ) is now available.

On November 14, 2025, Cincinnati Financial Corporation declared an 87 cents-per-share regular quarterly cash dividend, payable on January 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 22, 2025. This decision reflects the board’s confidence in the company’s capital position and operational performance, aiming to deliver steady value to shareholders while maintaining a disciplined approach to risk management.

data.title: IIOT-OXYS Delays 10-Q Filing Due to Audit Review
data.description:
IIOT-OXYS ( (ITOX) ) has released a notification of late filing.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

  • Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions
  • Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

IIOT-OXYS, Inc. has announced a delay in filing its Form 10-Q (Quarter Report) for the financial period ending September 30, 2025. The primary reason for the delay is the company’s inability to complete the review process with its auditor. Despite this setback, IIOT-OXYS expects to file the report within five calendar days following the prescribed due date. The company does not anticipate any significant changes in its financial results compared to the same period last year. This notification was signed by Clifford L. Emmons, the Chief Executive Officer, indicating the company’s ongoing commitment to compliance.

More about IIOT-OXYS

Current Market Cap: $453.1K

data.title: US Oil Rig Count Surges, Exceeds Expectations
data.description:
The Baker Hughes Oil Rig Count in the USA increased to 417 from the previous count of 414, marking a rise of 3 rigs. This represents a 0.72% increase, indicating a higher level of drilling activity compared to the prior period.

This development is likely to positively impact energy stocks, as increased drilling activity can signal higher future oil production and revenues. The market effect is expected to be more sentiment-driven in the short term, as investors react to the immediate implications of increased oil exploration.

data.title: Natural Gas Stocks Surge: Market Faces Supply Shock
data.description:
The latest EIA Natural Gas Stocks Change report shows an increase of 45 billion cubic feet, up from the previous 33 billion cubic feet. This marks a significant rise of 12 billion cubic feet, indicating a higher inventory build-up compared to the last period.
